questions: You mention being unsure about the value the Advisor tool adds relative to its cost—what would convince you to keep it versus removing it?
When you tested the copilot's adaptive question strategy with those three personas, did any of them surprise you with how the copilot actually behaved differently than you expected?
You designed the PM's gate to let humans override the feature type classification and edit fields—did you encounter any situations during testing where the PM actually needed to do that?
